HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT BOSSA NOVA ROBOTICS, INC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's counsel James L. Jacobs and GCA Law Partners' motion to be relieved as counsel, which is unopposed, is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT BOSSA NOVA ROBOTICS, INC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's counsel Valerie M. Wagner and GCA Law Partners' motion to be relieved as counsel, which is unopposed, is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Greg Groeneveld, Esq. 415-308-3637 for Plaintiff.
Valerie Wagner, Esq. 650-237-7202 GCA Law Partners LLP for Defendant Bossa Nova.
Court Reporer: Myra Pish, CSR#11613, 559-940-3368, production@taltys.com, reported.

RULING - A R G U E D. Ms. Wagner argues. Mr. Groeneveld responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court permits the issue of service. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BOSSA NOVA ROBOTICS, INC.'S Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment.

Defendant's motion to vacate the sister state judgment is denied. (see word minutes for full details)

Mr. Groeneveld to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Myra Pish, CSR#11613, 559-940-3368, production@taltys.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an order denying motion to vacate sister state judgment is signed. ***

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Continued To May-24-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
